title: Senate Communications Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Senate Communications Center''' was a room of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that controlled all of the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] traffic going to and from the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. One of its watch officers was [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Jenbean]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Backlash (audiobook)}}
